message:
fix: save/restore focus around before-screenshot in captureActionWithDiff

Screenshots were causing focus to be lost, which broke Tab navigation
and other focus-dependent actions. Now we save the focused element
before taking screenshots and restore focus afterward.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
